text:
Created attachment 240488
diff file for update to 1.31.2.6739

multimedia/plexmediaserver-plexpass: Update to 1.31.2.6739

 * New release from Plex.tv

  Changelog:

   https://forums.plex.tv/t/plex-media-server/30447/558

    NEW:
     (TV) Add series- and season-level preferences controlling audio and subtitle
       stream selection (#8036)
    FIXES:
     (Playlist) > Smart playlists could fail when set to show/season/artist/album
       types when requested by someone other than server admin (#13427)
     (Push) The server could exit unexpectedly if a database error occurred within
       certain notification-handling code (#14112)
     (Scanner) TV episodes with certain naming formats involving underscores could
       fail to be scanned in (#14111)

  QA:

   portlint (0 fatal errors)
